name: create-django-api
description: Generate a full Django API including model, serializer, service, viewset, and router.
prompt:
Create a Django REST API following Arvi's backend architecture rules.

Generate the following files:
- models.py (UUID PK, timestamps)
- serializers.py (validation)
- services.py (business logic)
- views.py (viewset calling services)
- urls.py (router)

API Name: {{input}}

Follow:
- Clean service layer
- No logic in views
- DRY code
- Use proper response format
- Use select_related/prefetch

Write code in sections by file path.
